scripts.invoke:health: node --input-type=module -e "import('./src/app.js').then(async ({ app }) => { const res = await app({ rawPath: '/health', requestContext: { http: { method: 'GET' } } }); console.log(res); }).catch(err => { console.error(err); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.invoke:db-check: node --input-type=module -e "import('./src/app.js').then(async ({ app }) => { const res = await app({ rawPath: '/db-check', requestContext: { http: { method: 'GET' } } }); console.log(res); }).catch(err => { console.error(err); process.exit(1); })"
